mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_deposit_withdrawal WHERE `type` = 2 AND `status` = 101 AND user_id = #{userId} AND deposit_withdraw_way_id = #{withdrawWayId} ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM user_deposit_withdrawal WHERE `type` = 1 AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT site_code, user_id, user_account, currency_code, sum(arrive_amount) as arrive_amount FROM (SELECT site_code, user_id, user_account, currency_code, arrive_amount from user_deposit_withdrawal where `status` = '101' and type = '1' and site_code = #{siteCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and deposit_withdraw_type_code <> #{rechargeWithdrawCode} and updated_time >= #{startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} and updated_time <= #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} union all SELECT site_code, user_id, user_account, currency_code, adjust_amount from user_manual_up_down_record where adjust_way = 1 and site_code = #{siteCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and audit_status = 3 and adjust_type = 4 and audit_datetime >= #{startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} and audit_datetime <= #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} UNION ALL SELECT site_code, user_id, user_account, currency_code, amount from agent_deposit_subordinates WHERE site_code = #{siteCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and deposit_time >= #{startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deposit_time <= #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}) AS T group by site_code, user_id, user_account, currency_code

SELECT site_code, user_id, user_account, currency_code, sum(arrive_amount) as arrive_amount FROM (SELECT site_code, user_id, user_account, currency_code, arrive_amount from user_deposit_withdrawal where `status` = '101' and type = '2' and site_code = #{siteCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and pay_audit_time >= #{startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} and pay_audit_time <= #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} union all SELECT site_code, user_id, user_account, currency_code, adjust_amount from user_manual_up_down_record where adjust_way = 2 and audit_status = 3 and adjust_type = 4 and site_code = #{siteCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and audit_datetime >= #{startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} and audit_datetime <= #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}) as t group by site_code, user_id, user_account, currency_code

SELECT udw.site_code AS siteCode, udw.user_id AS userId, udw.user_account AS userAccount, udw.agent_id AS agentId, udw.agent_account AS agentAccount, udw.currency_code AS currencyCode, udw.arrive_amount AS amount, udw.deposit_withdraw_way_id AS depositWithdrawWayId, udw.fee_amount AS feeAmount, udw.way_fee_amount AS wayFeeAmount, udw.settlement_fee_amount AS settlementFeeAmount, 0 AS large_amount, 0 AS depositSubordinatesAmount, udw.updated_time AS recordTime FROM user_deposit_withdrawal udw WHERE udw.`status` = 101 AND udw.updated_time >= #{startTime} AND udw.updated_time <= #{endTime} AND udw.site_code = #{siteCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT user_account AS userAccount, min( created_time ) AS firstUsedTime, max( created_time ) AS lastUsedTime , COUNT( id ) AS usedNums, ANY_VALUE(currency_code) AS currencyCode FROM user_deposit_withdrawal WHERE deposit_withdraw_address = #{vo.depositWithdrawAddress} AND site_code = #{vo.siteCode} AND id != #{vo.id} GROUP BY user_account) a ORDER BY a.lastUsedTime desc
